signals.npcLine: Crypto tides shift; trust falters in neon-lit alleys.
signals.questPulse: Recover lost funds from shadow exchanges before market dives.
signals.worldFeed: Digital credit rises slightly; fear grips the data streets.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter hints at looming pump and dump schemes.

signals.npcLine: Pengu’s remnants gather; whispers of rise under neon smog.
signals.questPulse: Intercept rogue traders exploiting MEGA and PENGU weaknesses.
signals.worldFeed: Small spikes in alt-data suggest brewing token skirmishes.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented signals reveal new players in forgotten markets.

signals.npcLine: Fear level spikes; insiders mask moves behind coded hazes.
signals.questPulse: Decode market whispers to anticipate sudden drops.
signals.worldFeed: Subtle shifts in cryptostreams hint at massive sell-offs.
signals.clueEvent: Silent alerts pulse from unseen nodes across the grid.

signals.npcLine: LUNC shadows flicker; chance for courier-run of secret data.
signals.questPulse: Extract hidden info tied to unstable coins before fadeout.
signals.worldFeed: Minor activity clusters near volatile tokens; stay alert.
signals.clueEvent: Lines cross in dark net forums discussing token revival.

signals.npcLine: Old mon whispers of a coming shift; trust no one.
signals.questPulse: Seek alliances with lost traders wary of new schemes.
signals.worldFeed: Market calm masks undercurrents of unrest among peers.
signals.clueEvent: Cryptic warnings issued via encrypted broadcasts to select few.
